examples: The effect of IGFBP-3 on the growth hormone promoter activity stimulated by triiodothyronine was determined by dual-luciferase reporter assay.
We addressed this question with the method of luciferase reporter gene.
The cloning of luciferase from fireflies, which also took place in 1985, proved just as useful.
The team will work with luciferase, an enzyme common in fireflies as well as some glowing fungi and bacteria.
Previous efforts to create light-emitting plants in the lab have made use of a luciferase gene derived from fireflies.
